creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
freerdp build fail after ffmpeg update:
ffmpeg-2.7.1_1,1                   =   up-to-date with index
ffmpeg26-2.6.3_5                   =   up-to-date with index

Fail even if no ffmpeg and gstreamer set in options.


root@rimwks# make reinstall
